sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66546" key="messhgudorpoxe/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσσηγῠ-δορπο-χέστης</orth>, <sense id="n66546.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁ μεσηγὺ δόρπου χέζων</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:127" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">127</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
